action_taken: Batch processing deadlocked at 04:30 UTC. INC-2025-0847 opened. Emergency fix PR-7808 deployed at 05:15 UTC. Batch reprocessed successfully. Reconciliation confirmed all records processed correctly after fix.

Settlement batch rounding error detected. Source total $2,934,567.89 vs destination total $2,934,564.72 — discrepancy of $3.17 across 46,230 transactions. INC-2025-0912 opened at 06:20 UTC. Root cause: HALF_UP rounding in settlement aggregation caused penny differences to compound across large batch. Emergency fix PR-7813 deployed at 03:15 UTC (fix was deployed before the reconciliation ran). Discrepancy existed in Nov 27 overnight batch but was not caught because the $3.17 discrepancy appeared only in the bank reconciliation file received Nov 28 morning.
